scope_note: QA Inert Prime Area Quantization family [111]: family_extension of QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 [107]; certifies that for any prime p inert in Z[phi], the norm form f(b,e)=b^2+be-e^2 over Z/p^k Z omits exactly the residues r with v_p(r)=1 (divisible by p but not p^2). Generalises [108] from the specific case p=3, k=2 to arbitrary inert p and k>=1.
